query:
SELECT c.id, c.claim_number, c.status, c.vehicle_market_value,
       COUNT(q.id) as quote_count,
       MAX(q.quoted_amount) as max_quote,
       MAX(q.labor_cost) as max_labour,
       MAX(q.parts_cost) as max_parts
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN panel_beater_quotes q ON q.claim_id = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.claim_number, c.status, c.vehicle_market_value
ORDER BY c.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
